title: Paradoc's Caution Pack
description: Adds some caution tape to your game.
body:
This Resource Pack adds caution tape to some hard to differentiate blocks throughout the world.

Inspired by Vanilla Tweaks' infested blocks in inventory pack, but definitely going further than they'd like.

Is compatible with other packs which change the texture of any affected blocks, but not packs that change models of affected blocks.

Affected Blocks:
* Suspicious Sand
* Suspicious Gravel
* Tripwire
* Powder Snow
* All Infested Blocks
